title: Getting Started
text: ntrs provides S7-based interface standardizing neuropsychological test scores. typical workflow : Create score objects using factory functions (e.g., MOCATOTS(), ANIMALS()) Standardize scores std() batch-standardize data frame std_data()

title: Getting Started
text: neuropsychological test dedicated factory function wraps raw numeric scores metadata (valid range, error codes, etc.): see available tests:
code: moca <- MOCATOTS(c(25, 28, 30)) moca <ntrs::MOCATOTS> num [1:3] 25 28 30  @ label: chr "MoCA"  @ range: num [1:2] 0 30  @ codes: Named num [1:2] -4 88  .. - attr(*, "names")= chr [1:2] "Not available: UDS form submitted did not collect data in this way, or a skip pattern precludes response to this question" "Item(s) or whole test not administered" list_npsych_scores() [1] "ANIMALS"  "BOSTON"   "CRAFTDRE" "CRAFTDVR" "CRAFTURS" "CRAFTVRS"  [7] "DIGBACCT" "DIGBACLS" "DIGFORCT" "DIGFORSL" "DIGIB"    "DIGIBLEN" [13] "DIGIF"    "DIGIFLEN" "LOGIMEM"  "MEMUNITS" "MINTTOTS" "MOCATOTS" [19] "NACCMMSE" "OTRAILA"  "OTRAILB"  "OTRLARR"  "OTRLBRR"  "REY6REC" [25] "REYAREC"  "REYDLIST" "REYDREC"  "REYTOTAL" "TRAILA"   "TRAILB" [31] "UDSBENTC" "UDSBENTD" "UDSVERFC" "UDSVERLC" "UDSVERTN" "VEG" [37] "WAIS"

title: Getting Started
text: standardizing, can check methods versions available given test: test registered defaults don’t need specify method every time: can changed globally set_std_defaults(): note changes default saved session session, may want set .Rprofile want persist.
code: list_std_methods(moca) [1] "norms"      "regression" list_method_versions(moca, "norms") [1] "nacc"    "updated" list_method_versions(moca, "regression") [1] "nacc"            "updated_2024.06" "updated_2025.06" get_std_defaults(moca) $method [1] "regression"  $version [1] "updated_2025.06" set_std_defaults(   moca,   method = "norms",   version = "nacc",   overwrite = TRUE ) ℹ Default method and version for "MOCATOTS" was previously set to "norms" and   "nacc". ℹ Will be overwritten. ✔ Set "nacc" as default for norms method on <MOCATOTS> get_std_defaults(moca) $method [1] "norms"  $version [1] "nacc"

title: Getting Started
text: Use std() convert raw scores z-scores. Covariates (age, sex, education, etc.) passed named arguments: override default method version, specify explicitly:
code: z <- std(moca, age = 72, sex = 1, educ = 16) z [1] -0.4166667  0.8333333  1.6666667 set_std_defaults(   moca,   method = "regression",   version = "updated_2025.06",   overwrite = TRUE ) ℹ Default method and version for "MOCATOTS" was previously set to "regression"   and "updated_2025.06". ℹ Will be overwritten. ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <MOCATOTS> z_reg <- std(moca, age = 72, sex = 1, educ = 16, race = 1) z_norms <- std(   moca,   method = "norms",   version = "updated",   age = 72,   sex = 1,   educ = 16 ) z_norms [1] -0.3532407  0.8313253  1.6210360

title: Getting Started
text: data frame multiple test score columns, std_data() standardizes : can override method/version per test class:
code: df <- data.frame(   age = c(72, 75, 68),   sex = c(1, 2, 1),   educ = c(16, 14, 12),   race = c(1, 2, 1),   moca = MOCATOTS(c(25, 28, 22)),   animals = ANIMALS(c(18, 20, 16)) )  result <- std_data(   df,   age = age,   sex = sex,   educ = educ,   race = race )  result age sex educ race moca animals     z_moca    z_animals 1  72   1   16    1   25      18  0.2659906 -0.062950951 2  75   2   14    2   28      20  1.0636149 -0.006775812 3  68   1   12    1   22      16 -0.4479148 -0.155103986 result2 <- std_data(   df,   methods = list(     MOCATOTS = c(method = "norms", version = "nacc")   ),   age = age,   sex = sex,   educ = educ,   race = race ) Warning: `race` is not needed to standardize using "norms" when version is "nacc" and will be ignored. result2 age sex educ race moca animals     z_moca    z_animals 1  72   1   16    1   25      18 -0.4166667 -0.062950951 2  75   2   14    2   28      20  0.8928571 -0.006775812 3  68   1   12    1   22      16 -1.0303030 -0.155103986

title: Getting Started
text: prefer different default method session, use set_std_defaults():
code: set_std_defaults(   MOCATOTS(),   method = "norms",   version = "nacc",   overwrite = TRUE )  # Subsequent calls use the new default std(MOCATOTS(c(25, 28)), age = 72, sex = 1, educ = 16)

title: Neuropsychological Test Result Standardization
text: goal ntrs provide streamlined framework working neuropsychological test results standardization . build around NACC UDS battery, designed make extension relatively painless interested parties.

title: Neuropsychological Test Result Standardization
text: can install development version ntrs GitHub :

title: Neuropsychological Test Result Standardization
text: basic example shows solve common problem:
code: library(ntrs) ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <UDSVERLC> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <NACCMMSE> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <MEMUNITS> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <MINTTOTS> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <UDSVERTN> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <VEG> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <DIGIFLEN> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <DIGIB> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <DIGFORSL> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <CRAFTVRS> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <DIGIBLEN> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <LOGIMEM> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <CRAFTURS> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <DIGIF> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <DIGBACCT> ✔ Set "nacc_legacy" as default for regression method on <BOSTON> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <UDSBENTD> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <OTRAILB> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <CRAFTDVR> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <DIGBACLS> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <UDSBENTC> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <OTRAILA> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <DIGFORCT> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <CRAFTDRE> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <ANIMALS> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <UDSVERFC> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <TRAILB> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <OTRLBRR> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <MOCATOTS> ✔ Set "updated_2025.06" as default for regression method on <TRAILA> moca_scores <- MOCATOTS(c(25, 28, 18))  std(   moca_scores,   age = c(62, 59, 61),   educ = c(15, 12, 13),   sex = c(1, 2, 2),   race = c(1, 4, 2) ) [1]  0.2024372  1.0233537 -3.2244596

title: MOCATOTS Test Scores — MOCATOTS
text: Create MOCATOTS object hold MoCA scores.

title: MOCATOTS Test Scores — MOCATOTS
text: x Numeric scores.

title: MOCATOTS Test Scores — MOCATOTS
text: object class MOCATOTS.

title: Register a standardization version — .register_std_version
text: Stores std_version object (e.g., norms_version, regression_version) .std_versions registry, organized method, scores class, version ID.

title: Register a standardization version — .register_std_version
text: version_obj S7 object inheriting std_version. Contains version metadata (scores_class, method_name, version_id) method-specific data (e.g., lookup_table coefs). overwrite Logical. TRUE, allows overwriting existing version warning. FALSE (default), attempting register existing version throws error.

title: Register a standardization version — .register_std_version
text: Invisible NULL. Called side effects (storing data .std_versions environment).

title: Setup MOCATOTS method versions — .setup_MOCATOTS_versions
text: Registers versions MOCATOTS test class, sets default method. Meant called .onLoad

title: Setup MOCATOTS method versions — .setup_MOCATOTS_versions
text: NULL, invisibly. function called side effects registering test versions setting defaults.

title: Get version data — get_version_data
text: Retrieve standardization data specific method version test score class .std_versions registry. method /version NULL, defaults resolved via get_std_defaults().

title: Get version data — get_version_data
text: scores npsych_scores object (e.g., MOCATOTS()). method single string specifying standardization method (e.g., "norms", "regression"). NULL (default), default method scores class used. version single string specifying version name. NULL (default), default version resolved method used. Must NULL method NULL.

title: Get version data — get_version_data
text: registered standardization data requested method/version combination. Errors specified (resolved default) version exist.

what: Register a norms-based standardization version — register_norms_version
title: Register a norms-based standardization version — register_norms_version
text: Creates norms_version object registers .std_versions registry via .register_std_version().

title: Register a norms-based standardization version — register_norms_version
code: register_norms_version(   scores,   version,   lookup_table,   covar_fns,   overwrite = FALSE,   description = "" )

title: Register a norms-based standardization version — register_norms_version
text: scores npsych_scores object, MOCATOTS(). Used determine scores class registration. version Character string identifying version (e.g., "nacc", "updated"). lookup_table Data frame containing norms. Must include columns m (mean) sd (standard deviation), may include n(sample size). Additional columns treated covariate grouping variables must matching entries covar_fns. See norms_version validation details. covar_fns named list functions transform raw covariate inputs match levels lookup_table. Names must match non-statistic columns (everything m, sd, n) lookup_table. overwrite Logical. FALSE (default), error thrown version version scores class already exists registry. TRUE, existing version overwritten new one. description Optional character string describing version.

title: Register a norms-based standardization version — register_norms_version
text: Invisible NULL. Called side effect registering version internal .std_versions registry.

what: Register a regression-based standardization version — register_regression_version
title: Register a regression-based standardization version — register_regression_version
text: Creates regression_version object registers .std_versions registry via .register_std_version().

title: Register a regression-based standardization version — register_regression_version
code: register_regression_version(   scores,   version,   coefs,   covar_fns = NULL,   description = "",   overwrite = FALSE )

title: Register a regression-based standardization version — register_regression_version
text: scores npsych_scores object, MOCATOTS(). Used determine scores class registration. version Character string identifying version (e.g., "nacc", "updated"). coefs named numeric vector data frame regression coefficients. Must include "intercept" "rmse" entries. Additional names treated covariate coefficients. See regression_version validation details. covar_fns named list functions transform raw covariate inputs. Must include entries coefficient names "intercept" "rmse". description Optional character string describing version. overwrite Logical. TRUE, allows overwriting existing version warning. Defaults FALSE.

title: Register a regression-based standardization version — register_regression_version
text: Invisible NULL. Called side effect registering version internal .std_versions registry.
